# FeeBook

> FeeBook is a free fee tracking web app built for Indian private tuition teachers.

## What it solves
- Partial cash payment tracking (existing apps only have Paid/Unpaid)
- Eliminates embarrassing automated reminders sent to parents after cash already received
- Simple dashboard showing paid, partial, and pending students
- WhatsApp-native reminder workflow — teacher always in control
- Works on any phone browser, no download needed

## Who uses it
- Solo tuition teachers in India teaching 10-80 students from home
- Small coaching centers in Tier 2 and Tier 3 Indian cities
- Teachers who collect fees primarily in cash

## Pricing
- Free: Up to 15 students, core features
- Pro: Rs 99 per month, unlimited students, attendance, expenses, reports

## Built by
An 11th grade student in India who watched his own tuition teacher struggle with manual fee tracking.

## Website
https://feebook.vercel.app
